compiled_contract.description: 软件开发的完成开发流程，严格遵循skill中定义的流程规范 Primary output: 一个重复使用的技能包 Keep this correction in scope: 正确.
compiled_contract.job_to_be_done: 软件开发的完成开发流程，严格遵循skill中定义的流程规范

trigger.description: 软件开发的完成开发流程，严格遵循skill中定义的流程规范 Primary output: 一个重复使用的技能包 Keep this correction in scope: 正确.
should_trigger: 软件开发的完成开发流程，严格遵循skill中定义的流程规范 Primary output: 一个重复使用的技能包 Keep this correction in scope: 正确.
should_not_trigger: one-off adjacent requests that do not match the recurring job
private local material that was not intentionally included

decision_points: Ask one focused clarification when the real job, output, or exclusion boundary is unclear.
Escalate visible tradeoffs when benchmark patterns conflict with local privacy, naming, or governance constraints.
Do not silently broaden the skill into adjacent jobs just because the examples are nearby.
failure_modes: Tables can render as dense grids with weak hierarchy or poor mobile readability.
Long bullets can make the output look complete while hiding the actual decision logic.
Screenshots can be captured from the wrong state, wrong viewport, or wrong crop.
Missing screenshots can cause the skill to invent visual references instead of declaring the gap.
Footnote markers or dense citation notes can interrupt the reading flow.
Evidence can be over-attached to obvious statements and under-attached to risky claims.
Users start invoking the skill for adjacent one-off or explanation-only requests.
Outputs remain valid but become generic, cluttered, or weakly aligned with the user's domain.
Borrowed benchmark patterns no longer fit the local job or add ceremony without payoff.
Skill usage becomes team-critical while ownership, review cadence, or rollback evidence stays informal.

target_permission_contract.operator_note: OpenAI target carries permission metadata for reviewer visibility; host enforcement remains outside the package.

target_native_contract.native_surface: OpenAI-style interface metadata plus neutral Agent Skills source

activation.policy: Use frontmatter description for catalog routing and targets/openai/agents/openai.yaml for display name, default prompt, and compatibility metadata.

resources.strategy: Ship the neutral source tree and expose OpenAI-facing interface metadata as a generated companion file.

scripts.strategy: Keep scripts as local package resources; expose help-smoke and permission metadata for reviewer approval before execution.

review.fallback_behavior: If OpenAI-native metadata is ignored, the package remains readable as neutral Agent Skills source.
unsupported_native_features: client-native script permission prompts are represented as permission contract metadata
